channel.title: Aegix Security Blog
channel.description: Insights, research, and guides on modern application security, zero-trust architectures, and developer productivity.

item.title: Env Vars vs. KMS: The Secret Management Paradox
item.description: A deep dive into the security tradeoffs between environment variables and dedicated Key Management Systems in modern CI/CD pipelines.

item.title: Scaling Trust: A Guide to Envelope Encryption
item.description: Protect your data at scale by mastering the relationship between DEKs and KEKs.

item.title: Why Rust is the Future of Secure Systems
item.description: Exploring memory safety, ownership, and how Rust eliminates entire classes of vulnerabilities.

item.title: Hardening the Software Supply Chain
item.description: A deep dive into securing your CI/CD pipelines and managing third-party dependency risks.

item.title: Beyond the Perimeter: Implementing Zero Trust
item.description: Why traditional network security is failing modern distributed teams and how to fix it.

item.title: The Emerging Landscape of AI-Driven Threats
item.description: How large language models are being leveraged for automated phishing and vulnerability discovery.
